title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses emerging autonomous coding capabilities and tools, covering the /goal feature for agentic workflows, Crewlet framework for multi-agent coordination, and Mission exploration for extended autonomous tasks. The commentary presents these as markers of genuine autonomous coding advancement beyond previous iterations.
